title: SBP Chat Completions Response
description: OpenAI-compatible response body with the 'sbp' metadata namespace. HTTP 200 for a completed turn; HTTP 202 when a suspended session is found.

session_id.description: Stable session identifier. Persist this to resume the session later.

snapshot_id.description: ID of the snapshot taken this turn, if any.

resume_available.description: True when an HTTP 202 is returned — a suspended session was found.

resume_prompt.description: Human-readable hint of what the agent was last doing. Suitable for displaying to the user before they confirm a resume.

last_checkpoint.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful snapshot.

step_count.description: Number of turns completed in this session.

cost_usd.description: Estimated cost of this turn in USD. OPTIONAL — implementation-defined.

model_routed_to.description: The actual model used for this turn (may differ from the requested model if routing occurred).
